cards.back: A sorting algorithm that uses a combination of counting sort and comparison to sort elements in an array

cards.front: What is the time complexity of Comparison Counting Sort?
cards.back: O(nk), where n is the number of elements and k is the range of input

cards.front: What is the space complexity of Comparison Counting Sort?
cards.back: O(n + k), where n is the number of elements and k is the range of input

cards.front: What is the goal of Comparison Counting Sort?
cards.back: To achieve a good balance between time and space complexity

cards.front: What is the key difference between Comparison Counting Sort and other sorting algorithms?
cards.back: Comparison Counting Sort uses a combination of counting sort and comparison to sort elements, while other algorithms may use different approaches
